Class PulsarMessageChannelBinder

java.lang.Object
org.springframework.cloud.stream.binder.AbstractBinder<org.springframework.messaging.MessageChannel, ExtendedConsumerProperties<PulsarConsumerProperties>, ExtendedProducerProperties<PulsarProducerProperties>>
org.springframework.cloud.stream.binder.AbstractMessageChannelBinder<ExtendedConsumerProperties<PulsarConsumerProperties>, ExtendedProducerProperties<PulsarProducerProperties>, PulsarTopicProvisioner>
org.springframework.cloud.stream.binder.pulsar.PulsarMessageChannelBinder
All Implemented Interfaces:
org.springframework.beans.factory.Aware, org.springframework.beans.factory.InitializingBean, Binder<org.springframework.messaging.MessageChannel, ExtendedConsumerProperties<PulsarConsumerProperties>, ExtendedProducerProperties<PulsarProducerProperties>>, ExtendedBindingProperties<PulsarConsumerProperties, PulsarProducerProperties>, ExtendedPropertiesBinder<org.springframework.messaging.MessageChannel, PulsarConsumerProperties, PulsarProducerProperties>, PollableConsumerBinder<org.springframework.messaging.MessageHandler, ExtendedConsumerProperties<PulsarConsumerProperties>>, org.springframework.context.ApplicationContextAware, org.springframework.context.ApplicationEventPublisherAware
public class PulsarMessageChannelBinder extends AbstractMessageChannelBinder<ExtendedConsumerProperties<PulsarConsumerProperties>, ExtendedProducerProperties<PulsarProducerProperties>, PulsarTopicProvisioner> implements ExtendedPropertiesBinder<org.springframework.messaging.MessageChannel, PulsarConsumerProperties, PulsarProducerProperties>
Binder implementation for Apache Pulsar.
Author:
Soby Chacko, Chris Bono

    • PulsarMessageChannelBinder

      public PulsarMessageChannelBinder(PulsarTopicProvisioner provisioningProvider, org.springframework.pulsar.core.PulsarTemplate<Object> pulsarTemplate, org.springframework.pulsar.core.PulsarConsumerFactory<?> pulsarConsumerFactory, PulsarBinderConfigurationProperties binderConfigProps, org.springframework.pulsar.core.SchemaResolver schemaResolver, org.springframework.pulsar.support.header.PulsarHeaderMapper headerMapper)

  • Method Details

    • createProducerMessageHandler

      protected org.springframework.messaging.MessageHandler createProducerMessageHandler(ProducerDestination destination, ExtendedProducerProperties<PulsarProducerProperties> producerProperties, org.springframework.messaging.MessageChannel errorChannel)
      Description copied from class: AbstractMessageChannelBinder
      Create a MessageHandler with the ability to send data to the target middleware. If the returned instance is also a Lifecycle, it will be stopped automatically by the binder.

      In order to be fully compliant, the MessageHandler of the binder must observe the following headers:

      • BinderHeaders.PARTITION_HEADER - indicates the target partition where the message must be sent

      Specified by:
      createProducerMessageHandler in class AbstractMessageChannelBinder<ExtendedConsumerProperties<PulsarConsumerProperties>, ExtendedProducerProperties<PulsarProducerProperties>, PulsarTopicProvisioner>
      Parameters:
      destination - the name of the target destination
      producerProperties - the producer properties
      errorChannel - the error channel (if enabled, otherwise null). If not null, the binder must wire this channel into the producer endpoint so that errors are forwarded to it.
      Returns:
      the message handler for sending data to the target middleware

    • createConsumerEndpoint

      protected org.springframework.integration.core.MessageProducer createConsumerEndpoint(ConsumerDestination destination, String group, ExtendedConsumerProperties<PulsarConsumerProperties> properties)
      Description copied from class: AbstractMessageChannelBinder
      Creates MessageProducer that receives data from the consumer destination. will be started and stopped by the binder.
      Specified by:
      createConsumerEndpoint in class AbstractMessageChannelBinder<ExtendedConsumerProperties<PulsarConsumerProperties>, ExtendedProducerProperties<PulsarProducerProperties>, PulsarTopicProvisioner>
      Parameters:
      destination - reference to the consumer destination
      group - the consumer group
      properties - the consumer properties
      Returns:
      the consumer endpoint.

    • getExtendedProducerProperties

      getExtendedProducerProperties in interface ExtendedBindingProperties<PulsarConsumerProperties, PulsarProducerProperties>

    • getDefaultsPrefix

      public String getDefaultsPrefix()
      Description copied from interface: ExtendedBindingProperties
      Extended binding properties can define a default prefix to place all the extended common producer and consumer properties. For example, if the binder type is foo it is convenient to specify common extended properties for the producer or consumer across multiple bindings in the form of `spring.cloud.stream.foo.default.producer.x=y` or `spring.cloud.stream.foo.default.consumer.x=y`. The binding process will use this defaults prefix to resolve any common extended producer and consumer properties.
      Specified by:
      getDefaultsPrefix in interface ExtendedBindingProperties<PulsarConsumerProperties, PulsarProducerProperties>
      Returns:
      default prefix for extended properties

    • getExtendedPropertiesEntryClass

      public Class<? extends BinderSpecificPropertiesProvider> getExtendedPropertiesEntryClass()
      Description copied from interface: ExtendedBindingProperties
      Extended properties class which should be a subclass of BinderSpecificPropertiesProvider against which default extended producer and consumer properties are resolved.
      Specified by:
      getExtendedPropertiesEntryClass in interface ExtendedBindingProperties<PulsarConsumerProperties, PulsarProducerProperties>
      Returns:
      extended properties class that contains extended producer/consumer properties
